summary: Lead accepted M7-APPOINTMENT-FLOW-QUALITY-001 after systems_architect ACCEPT and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT at fixed implementation commit f69882f5387693f1aa10eca1d5adfdca7b206214. The default player appointment flow now covers office selection, candidate comparison, eligible/rejected explanation, administrative impact preview, confirmation, and result feedback while keeping bulk submit, raw reason details, state hash, raw IDs, and legacy diagnostics inside explicit debug affordances. The implementation stays within UI/web/client-core/test/story/process paths, uses existing read models and command builders, preserves sim.appoint-office GameCommand parity, and does not write authoritative WorldState or duplicate appointment/governance formulas.

risks.summary: The web shell still records local UI status after command submission as pre-existing shell-fixture behavior; runtime integration must continue to preserve the same GameCommand boundary.
The explicit developer overlay intentionally retains technical labels, raw IDs, and raw reason details; acceptance covers default player-mode separation plus explicit debug affordance.
Vite and Storybook large-chunk warnings remain existing non-blocking warnings.
